SEARCH
Package org.teavm.jso

Interface JSObject

All Known Subinterfaces:
Document, Element, HTMLElement, PlantUMLBrowser.RenderCallback, TeaVmScriptLoader.Err, TeaVmScriptLoader.Ok
All Known Implementing Classes:
HTMLDocument
public interface JSObject
Mock for org.teavm.jso.JSObject.

In the real TeaVM runtime, this is the base interface for all JavaScript interop types. Here it serves only as a compilation stub.
